title: tithymalus tommasinianus subsp. waldsteinii
intro: Tithymalus tommasinianus subsp. waldsteinii, also known as the Waldstein's Barberry, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sap and roots. The health benefits of Waldstein's Barberry include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus tommasinianus subsp. waldsteinii include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
